title: Midjourney Image Generation Job
description: Represents an asynchronous image generation job in the Midjourney API, including its configuration parameters, current status, and generation results.

id.description: The unique identifier assigned to this image generation job.

type.description: The type of image generation operation performed by this job.

status.description: The current processing status of the job.

progress.description: The completion progress as a percentage from 0 to 100.

prompt.description: The text prompt submitted for image generation.

parent_job_id.description: The job identifier of the parent generation, present for upscale and variation jobs.

image_index.description: The index of the selected image from the parent job grid, present for upscale and variation jobs.

webhook_url.description: The webhook URL configured to receive status change notifications for this job.

webhook_type.description: Controls when webhook notifications are delivered for this job.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the job was created.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the job was last updated.

completed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the job completed processing.

GenerationParameters.description: Configuration parameters that control the image generation process.

aspect_ratio.description: The aspect ratio for generated images, expressed as width:height.

model_version.description: The Midjourney model version used for generation.

process_mode.description: The processing speed mode for the generation job.

quality.description: The quality setting controlling detail level and GPU time consumption.

stylize.description: The stylization strength from 0 (literal) to 1000 (highly artistic).

chaos.description: Controls the diversity between the four generated images in a grid.

seed.description: Seed value for reproducible generation results.

no.description: Negative prompt specifying elements to exclude from generated images.

JobResult.description: The output of a successfully completed image generation job.

images.description: List of generated images with download URLs and metadata.

prompts.description: Generated text prompt suggestions, present only for describe job results.

GeneratedImage.description: A single generated image with its metadata and download URL.

url.description: The URL where the generated image can be downloaded.

index.description: The position of this image in the generation grid (1-4).

width.description: The width of the image in pixels.

height.description: The height of the image in pixels.

content_type.description: The MIME type of the image file.

JobError.description: Error information for a failed image generation job.

code.description: Machine-readable error code identifying the type of failure.
